titleStmt.title: SII 24.318: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 318. (A.R. No. 338 of 1950-51.) II PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL, PROPER LEFT OF ENTRANCE, EAST SIDE (Below No. 52 of 1892)

summary.p: Registers a gift of 2 vēli of land by purchase and measured by Uḻavaṉ in the village Mēlaimuri Māvaḍumaṅgalam in Maḻanāḍu and 2 vēli in Velvāykkuḍi for specified offerings to god after regular worship in the morning and 30 cows for a perpetual lamp by Mallaṇaṅgaḷ alias Mādhavadāsar, the pradhāna at Chandragiri. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1342, Śārvari, Karkaṭaka, śu. 1, Thursday, Pūśam correspond to 1420 A.D., July 11, Thursday f.d.t. ·02; ·36.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran śrīvīrapratāpa devarāyamahārāyarkkuc cellā niṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 4 10 2- ṉ
meṟ cellāniṉṟa cārvvari samvatsarattu karkkaṭakanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu prathamaiyum bṛhaspati
vāramum peṟṟa pūcattunāḷ perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthaṉukkucandragiriyil pradhāṉamalla ṇaṅkaḷāṉa
mādhavadāsar Ubhayamāka Udayakālattil tiruvārādhaṉāṉan=taramāka Amutu ceytaruḷum
taḷikai Iraṇṭukku tiruvaraṅkatevaṉāl Amutupaṭi tūṇikkum paruppu Amutu teṅkāyamutu paḻavamutu
kaṟiyamutu Uppamutu miḷakamutu neyyamutu Uṭpaṭa taḷikai Iraṇṭukku viṇṇappañ ceyvār Irāyar taṇṭu
Iṟaiyiliyāy śrīpaṇṭārattiṟ cerntu varu nilamāy śrīceṉāpatip peruvilai yākak koṇṭu dhārāpūrvva
māka viṭṭa maḻaināṭu melaimuṟi māvaṭumaṅkalattil Uḻavaṉāl rūpāy 2- li Ituvum veḷvāykkuṭiyil Uḻavaṉā
l rūpāy 2- li Āka rūpāy 4- li Ituvum tirunantāviḷakkukku viṭṭa pacu Uru 3 10 Inta nilam nālveliyum pacu Uru mup
patum candrādityavaraiyum naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum
Digital edition of SII 24.318 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
